subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Hadith al-Jariyya
subcodes.first_line: I shall, relying on God and in the manner befitting His guidance, offer an interpretation of the tradition recorded in Al-Kafi concerning the knowledge of the unseen as narrated by Sudair [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. فاقول مستغنیاً بالله فی تفسیر بعض حدیث المروی فی الکافی فی ذکر علم الغیب عن سدیر
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @outward and inward meanings, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @transcendence; unknowability of God
